devops-cybersecurity.notes: Exemplary AZ authenticity: CBA Circular 14/2023, ISMSN/DƏIM, ASAN 2020 outage postmortem, AzərGold 2016 supply chain, SOCAR, Ministry of Digital Development all named with correct enforcement specificity. london_delta format is structurally perfect on every question. IRT: irt_a all ≥1.2, b-values well spread (-0.7 to 1.9). Two evaluation rubrics are excellent with 5 levels each, AZ-specific at level 5. empathy_safeguarding at Q5 and Q9.

financial-analyst.notes: Best-in-class AZ institution depth: IBA default (USD 3.3B, May 2015), SOFAZ, CBA Decree No.8 with exact stress parameters (40% real estate haircut, 3x NPL, 200bps), CBA CAMELS, Regulation No.13, Kapital Bank, PASHA Bank, ABB. IBA restructuring open_ended (Q8) is the deepest scenario in the corpus — 5-level rubric with specific provisioning percentages, AZN devaluation path (0.78→1.05→1.60). london_delta names exact regulatory articles. empathy_safeguarding at Q7 (PASHA AML) and Q9 (AccessBank fraud). rubric_quality 15/15 — every rubric has AZ-specific criteria at level 5.

hr-manager.notes: Strong AZ authenticity: DSMF e-portal, AZ Labour Code Art.73/77/78, Personal Data Protection Commission (998-IIIQ), Cabinet Decision No.430, SOCAR/AHIK, Kapital Bank mass redundancy, Baku City Court. Q8 rubric hits Art.77 threshold analysis (68/4200=1.6%). Minor: Q9 SJT hard missing london_delta field — only question in all files with this omission (-2). IRT irt_b clusters at 1.4-1.5 on hard questions.

marketing-manager.notes: Good AZ authenticity: Azercell, PASHA Holding, Kapital Bank, Şirvanşah Foods, Lalafo.az, JCDecaux Azerbaijan, TechMart, BirBank. Mahalle WhatsApp groups insight is genuine AZ-specific. Penalty: Q7 has empty az_institutions — only omission of this type. Q9 hard open_ended missing evaluation_rubric — the only hard open_ended without rubric across all 7 files.

product-manager.notes: Strong: AzərGold SOAP gateway (10-day IP whitelist SLA documented), ASAN xidmét rate limits (100 req/hour, 3-5 day increase), ABB Bank SLA penalty (0.1%/hour). Bayesian A/B testing for 500k-user market is best 'why AZ is different' question. Q10 SOCAR scope creep (1.2M AZN contract) is best leadership scenario. empathy_safeguarding: Q7 (MIA surveillance) and Q9 (AI name bias, AZ naming as protected class).

qa-engineer.notes: Strong: DƏIM 24-hour disclosure, ASAN xidmét single-auth backbone regression scope, CBA fintech pre-launch requirements, Baku Metro AZS 4512-2026, Ministry of Digital Development. Q8 (ASAN 2020 outage test strategy) excellent. Q9 medical data empathy scenario is most ethically rich empathy question in corpus. Minor: Q3 uses 'AMB' in AZ text but 'CBA' in institution list.

scrum-master.notes: Strong cultural intelligence: AZ face-saving patterns, hierarchical deference, soviet-style control mental model all backed by institutional examples (Kapital Bank, ASAN, PASHA Technology, SOCAR SAFe). Q10 SOCAR transformation open_ended has deepest rubric in file. SOCAR-heavy (4 questions) but justified. Minor: Q1 irt_c=0.18 is highest in corpus but defensible for easy 4-option MCQ.

winner_top_patterns: Exact regulation article numbers + quantified parameters in london_delta: 'CBA Decree No.8: 40% real estate haircut, 3x NPL, 200bps rate shock' — every consequence names the article AND the number

5-level evaluation rubrics gated on AZ-specific knowledge: level 5 requires naming CBA Regulation No.13 provisioning floors by category (substandard 20%, doubtful 50%, loss 100%) and SOFAZ two-instrument bailout structure — impossible to answer with global finance knowledge alone

Institutional depth: IBA default dated (May 2015, USD 3.3B), AZN devaluation path (0.78→1.05→1.60) cited as specific historical record, not just 'AZ had a devaluation' — judges real knowledge vs surface recall
lowest_failure_modes: Q7 tech_literacy MCQ has empty az_institutions array — only question across all 7 files with this structural omission
Q9 hard open_ended missing evaluation_rubric entirely — only hard open_ended without a rubric in the corpus, breaking the structural contract
sprint6_recommendations: Carry forward the financial-analyst pattern: london_delta consequence must name regulation article number AND quantified threshold (e.g., 'CBA Decree No.8 Article 7: 40% real estate haircut, 200bps rate shock') — not just the regulation name

Hard open_ended rubric template: level 5 must explicitly require naming AZ-specific institution + article number + quantified threshold — use IBA restructuring rubric (financial-analyst Q8) as canonical template for all Sprint 6 agents
Pre-generation validation: fail any question where az_institutions is empty without justification, or where hard open_ended lacks evaluation_rubric — these are structural errors, not quality issues
